item.title: hyper-neutrino / advent-of-code
item.description:
Desc: My Advent of Code submissions. These are the original code I used, without any modifications after-the-fact. As such, they are probably not as efficient or short as they should be, because I want a working solution faster, not a better solution.
Lang: Python
